'''Exoticalia Pet Emporium''' was an exotic pet store in [[Drev'starn]], [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] owned by [[Drend Navett]] and [[Klif]]. The store was set up as a cover for [[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance's]] mission to bring down Bothawui's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] before a [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|battle at Bothawui]]. The shop was near the planetary shield generator. In order to avoid too much attention, they kept [[polpian]]s, which many Bothans were allergic to, in stock. They also sold [[mawkren]]s, which they used to destroy the shield generator.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
